name: Equation Story
description: Render equation-card JSON into a color-coded explanation card.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; child-src 'self'; object-src 'self';
